headline: Q4 Earnings Roundup: Northern Trust (NASDAQ:NTRS) And The Rest Of The Custody Bank Segment
summary: As the Q4 earnings season comes to a close, it’s time to take stock of this quarter’s best and worst performers in the custody bank industry, including Northern Trust (NASDAQ:NTRS) and its peers.
